description_long: This is a stylized adult woman with a medium build, depicted standing upright with arms relaxed at her sides. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve button-up shirt tucked into high-waisted, slim-fit pants, giving her a professional and modern appearance. Her shoes are low-heeled and closed-toe, suitable for walking in urban environments. The figure has a short, voluminous bob hairstyle that frames her face and neck. The facial features are expressive, with defined eyebrows and a neutral expression. The overall design is clean and streamlined, with smooth surfaces and subtle anatomical detailing.
description: A standing adult woman in professional attire with a short bob hairstyle and low-heeled shoes, depicted in a stylized, clean form.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, button-up shirt, high-waisted pants, and both arms and legs clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the contour of the shirt and pants, and the shape of the bob hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, pants, and shoes, as well as the rounded shape of the hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the relaxed arm and leg posture.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted button-up shirt and high-waisted slim-fit pants in a professional style
